ddls:
CREATE TABLE "memory_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the memory model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the model was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the memory model */,
  "lifecycle_status" TEXT /* Lifecycle status of the memory model */,
  "memory_type" TEXT /* Type of memory (e.g., NAND, NOR) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the memory model */,
  "data_sheet" TEXT /* Path or URL to the data sheet for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory model the metric is associated with */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the metric is associated with */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the metric is measured */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the metric */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the metric */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the metric */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the metric */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of testing for the metric */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for the metric */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES memory_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the operation */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the operation is critical for performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "is_key" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is a key performance indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range for the condition */,
  "voltage_range" TEXT /* Voltage range for the condition */,
  "humidity_range" TEXT /* Humidity range for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory model tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_operator" TEXT /* Operator who conducted the test */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the test was conducted */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being tested */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value of the test */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the test result */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the test */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES memory_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
